---
id: list-agreements
title: "List agreements with keyset pagination"
description: "Lists eligible agreements using a base64 cursor. Supports the same agreement-level filters as `/v1/sections` except clause-type taxonomy filtering."
sidebar_label: "List agreements with keyset pagination"
hide_title: true
hide_table_of_contents: true
api: 
sidebar_class_name: "get api-method"
info_path: docs/pandects/pandects-api
custom_edit_url: null
---

  as={"h1"}

  children={"List agreements with keyset pagination"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"get"}
  path={"/v1/agreements"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



Lists eligible agreements using a base64 cursor. Supports the same agreement-level filters as `/v1/sections` except clause-type taxonomy filtering.
